ground_truth.title: School of Rock | Music Programs
ground_truth.main_content: School of Rock offers music programs for kids, teens, and adults of all skill levels. Join the largest music school in the world with performance-based music education. Our programs include Rock 101 for ages 8-13, the Performance Program for ages 8-18, Rookies for ages 6-7, Little Wing for ages 4-5, Songwriting for ages 12 and over, the Adult Program for ages 18 and over, Recording & Production for ages 12 and over, House Band for ages 18 and under, and AllStars for ages 17 and under. Twenty years of experience and hundreds of thousands of students have taught us that playing music with others results in stronger proficiency compared to conventional music education. Working toward and experiencing live performance is the core of our curriculum. Our students grow as individuals by taking the stage with others. While our students work with bandmates, they learn broader life skills like collaboration, compromise and courage. We call this revolutionary approach to music education The School of Rock Method. The School of Rock Method builds musical proficiency through our proprietary Method App, Method Book collection, and SongFirst approach. Our Method has been awarded a patent making our teaching system available nowhere else. Students build confidence and musical proficiency through play shows in real rock venues, developing the skills to become a musician through a proven combination of private lessons and group rehearsals.
with: School of Rock offers music programs for kids, teens, and adults of all skill levels.
The Performance Program is School of Rock's hallmark music program.
Rock 101 is one of School of Rock's major music programs for kids ages 8-13.
Playing music with others results in stronger proficiency compared to conventional music education.
Our Method has been awarded a patent making our teaching system available nowhere else.
